```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr;gap:1em;align-items:center;">

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #5654A2;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1em 1.1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(86,84,162,0.15);">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">stage</div>
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:2.2em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;line-height:1;">00</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;font-weight:700;margin-top:0.4em;">Single-agent baseline</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.3em;">
   Just Claude Code in your project.<br>A <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;">CLAUDE.md</code>. Maybe a few skills.
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="text-align:left;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">signals you've outgrown it</div>
  <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Tasks span multiple sessions</li>
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Model declares victory on stubs</li>
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>More correcting than building</li>
   <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Quality varies wildly</li>
  </ul>
 </div>

</div>

<div style="margin-top:0.9em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
 you don't need a harness yet
</div>
```
